nl_query: For each department, show the department name, number of courses, number of faculty members, number of active boards, number of scripts currently in evaluation, and the average marks awarded per script.
failed_sql:
SELECT au.name AS academic_unit_name, COUNT(DISTINCT au.id) AS course_count, COUNT(DISTINCT fc.id) AS faculty_count, COUNT(DISTINCT b.id) AS active_board_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ea.status = 'NOT_ASSIGNED' THEN a.id ELSE NULL END) AS scripts_in_evaluation, AVG(COUNT(ea.id)) FILTER (WHERE ea.status = 'NOT_ASSIGNED') * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ea.status = 'NOT_ASSIGNED' THEN a.id ELSE NULL END), 0) AS avg_eval_marks_per_script
FROM   academic_unit au
JOIN   academic_unit_closure c ON c.ancestor_id = au.id
JOIN   academic_unit course ON course.id     = c.descendant_id
JOIN   faculty_cache fc ON fc.department_id = au.id
JOIN   board b ON b.course_id = au.id
JOIN   answer_script a ON a.course_id = au.id
LEFT JOIN evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.script_id = a.id AND ea.status = 'NOT_ASSIGNED'
GROUP  BY au.name, au.id, fc.id, b.id
ORDER  BY course_count DESC;
error: Validation failed (schema): Invalid value: evaluation_attempt.status = 'NOT_ASSIGNED' is not a valid value for this column. Allowed values: ASSIGNED, FROZEN, IN_PROGRESS, SUBMITTED. Tip — this column is constrained to a fixed set of values by a CHECK constraint; only the listed values can ever exist in the data. (and 3 more)
